name: RabbitMQ Broker
description: An open-source message broker that supports multiple messaging protocols, equipped with the Management Console.

aws.parity: Amazon MQ runs upstream RabbitMQ, so exchanges, queues and AMQP behavior are identical to local.
aws.deploy: Create an Amazon MQ for RabbitMQ broker and swap the AMQP connection URI — your topology carries over.

variables.label: AMQP Broker Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the RabbitMQ AMQP messaging broker.

variables.label: Management Console Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the RabbitMQ Web Management interface.

variables.label: Admin Username
variables.description: Default admin username to access the web management portal.

variables.label: Admin Password
variables.description: Default admin password to access the web management portal.
